description: Candidate public OSS corpus for the real-repository benchmark track. SHA values are placeholders (PIN-AT-PREP) until corpus-prep pins each repo at a measured commit; the two Stage R1 repos (excalidraw, backstage) are pinned. Selection gates (validated by benchmarks/lib/real-corpus.js assertSelectionGate): >=4 supported parser languages across the corpus, >=1 repo over 5000 approx_files, >=2 repos with real CODEOWNERS, >=2 workspace monorepos. approx_files is the crude `git ls-files | wc -l` count; for backstage that raw count (11833) is inflated by a large JSON/snapshot fixture mass, while the actual parseable TS/TSX source it indexes is ~4961-6901 files (in the Stage R1 1k-8k target). Fetch is gated behind --allow-corpus-fetch and is never exercised by the offline tests.
